description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with three stacked rectangular floors, each with wide overhanging flat roofs. The structure is predominantly white with clean, smooth surfaces and open sides, allowing visibility of the interior staircases. The central core of the house contains a vertical staircase with wooden steps, visible from multiple angles, connecting all three levels. The ground floor is elevated with a set of wooden steps leading up to the main entryway, which is open and lacks a traditional door. The house has minimal exterior detailing, with no visible windows or decorative elements, emphasizing its geometric form. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an urban environment.
description: A modern, three-story house with flat overhanging roofs, open sides, and a central wooden staircase. The design is minimalist, with smooth white surfaces and a prominent entry stairway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entryway with wooden stairs and a clear view of the central staircase inside.
description_view_1: Rear view with minimal visible features, mostly showing the flat surfaces and the back of the central core.
description_view_2: Side view revealing the open structure and the vertical alignment of the floors, with partial visibility of the staircase.
description_view_3: Opposite front view highlighting the main entry steps and the full height of the central staircase.
attribute_entryway_design: Open entryway with wide wooden steps, no door, and no porch or decorative elements
